title: Shampoo's Weapons API
description: An API that allows programmers to add custom weapons with custom crafting recipes, uses, etc.
body:
This mod allows other modders to create items that have custom crafting recipes, textures/models, abilities, stats, etc.

 

This mod only needs to be installed on the server's side, however, if you want the custom lang file and textures to register on the client side, you need to give your players a resource pack or have the server install a resource pack when they join it.

 
Current custom features:

- Custom Shaped and Shapeless Crafting Recipes
- Custom Use Method
- Custom Attack Ability
- Custom Throw Ability
- Custom Sneak Ability
- Custom Entity Interactions
- Custom Jump Ability
- Custom Item Cooldowns
- Custom Item Model/Texture Support
 

Installation instructions can be found on my [GitHub](https://github.com/MyShampooIsDrunk/weapons_api/) 

For additional support, join our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/JUee9ausGb)!
